properties.select_statement: SELECT cast(customer_id as integer) customer_id, trim(first_name) first_name, trim(last_name) last_name, lower(trim(email)) email, cast(signup_date as date) signup_date, upper(trim(country)) country, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) transformed_at FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_customers WHERE email IS NOT NULL

SELECT cast(order_id as integer) order_id, cast(customer_id as integer) customer_id, cast(order_ts as timestamp) order_ts, cast(cast(order_ts as timestamp) as date) order_date, lower(trim(status)) status, lower(trim(payment_method)) payment_method, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) transformed_at FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_orders WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT cast(order_item_id as integer) order_item_id, cast(order_id as integer) order_id, cast(product_id as integer) product_id, cast(quantity as integer) quantity, cast(discount_pct as decimal(5,2)) discount_pct, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) transformed_at FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_order_items WHERE quantity > 0

SELECT cast(product_id as integer) product_id, trim(product_name) product_name, trim(category) category, cast(unit_price as decimal(12,2)) unit_price, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) transformed_at FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_products WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL

WITH oi AS (SELECT cast(order_item_id as integer) order_item_id, cast(order_id as integer) order_id, cast(product_id as integer) product_id, cast(quantity as integer) quantity, cast(discount_pct as decimal(5,2)) discount_pct FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_order_items WHERE quantity > 0), o AS (SELECT cast(order_id as integer) order_id, cast(customer_id as integer) customer_id, cast(order_ts as timestamp) order_ts, cast(cast(order_ts as timestamp) as date) order_date, lower(trim(status)) status, lower(trim(payment_method)) payment_method FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_orders WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL), p AS (SELECT cast(product_id as integer) product_id, trim(product_name) product_name, trim(category) category, cast(unit_price as decimal(12,2)) unit_price FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_products WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL), c AS (SELECT cast(customer_id as integer) customer_id, trim(first_name) first_name, trim(last_name) last_name, lower(trim(email)) email, cast(signup_date as date) signup_date, upper(trim(country)) country FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze.bronze_customers WHERE email IS NOT NULL) SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, o.order_date, o.order_ts, o.status, o.payment_method, c.customer_id, c.country AS customer_country, p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category, oi.quantity, p.unit_price, oi.discount_pct, cast(oi.quantity * p.unit_price as decimal(14,2)) gross_amount, cast(oi.quantity * p.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount_pct) as decimal(14,2)) net_amount, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) transformed_at FROM oi JOIN o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
